items.summary: Govee has several sales running right now, including its Early Prime Day Pre-Sale promotions (all of which have been collected for you down below), and among them is the current offer for the Torchiere Floor Lamp with Matter down at $79.99 shipped, after clipping the on-page $70 off coupon, beating out Amazon by $10. Normally fetching $150 at full price, we’ve mostly seen discounts in 2026 cutting the costs down to $100 or $90 most often, with the last time we spotted this $80 low being in March. While the deal lasts, you’re getting a 47% markdown for $70 savings, landing it back at the all-time lowest price we have tracked for the third time this year.

items.title: These Matter-certified smart bulbs boast 1,600-lumen brightness, grab four down at $9.50 each (24% off)
items.summary:
Linkind 1,600-Lumen Matter Light Bulbs (4-pack)

Buy for $38 (Reg. $50)

What we love

Unlike a lot of other smart bulbs out there, especially on the affordable side, these crank out up to 1,600 lumens of brightness. Even better, they aren’t locked to a specific list of ecosystems. Matter certifications means they can work with Apple Home, Alexa Google Home, and many others.

items.title: Declutter your garage, yard, or porch with this 31-gallon outdoor storage box for $25 (Save 31%)
items.summary:
EAST OAK 31-Gallon Outdoor Storage Box

Buy for $25 (Reg. $36)

What we love

It’s easy for a yard, garage, or porch to get cluttered, and outdoor-ready containers like this can really help. According to the brand, it can handle a 330-pound load capacity, making it a solid fallback option for someone to grab a seat on too.

items.title: When is the Legend of Zelda Ocarina of Time Limited Edition Switch 2 console coming?
items.summary: Nintendo hosted its big summer Nintendo Direct presentation this week and it was…good. Not great, but good. I think the bevy of Nintendo leaks that have hit this year dulled the experience significantly for many folks, myself included, Nintendo stock has taken a bit of nose dive because of it, and more importantly, there’s more than a few gamers that walked away from the presentation far less excited than they should have been. So what’s next from Nintendo: Legend of Zelda Ocarina of Time limited edition Switch 2 console? A proper influx of major Game Cube titles? Is there one more surprise 2026 game release?

items.title: Deep PUMA discounts take Step Up Backpack down to $15, Contempt Demi Shoes $32, more from $10

What we love

If you could use a new mouse but don’t want to break the bank, this affordable option now costs even less. Instead of Bluetooth, it uses a 2.4GHz dongle, which in my personal experience I have found to be more responsive anyways.
